1.content: Well, first of all, how old is our aspiring exhibitionist going to be?
1.title: Decisions, decisions

12.content: How old is going to be our exhibitionist teenage girl?
12.title: Teen (13-17)

121.content:
"So, want to hang out after school? We could watch a movie at my place with the girls."

"No, thanks, Angela." Wendy replies. "I'm busy today with my piano lessons, maybe next time." She stands from her seat and leaves the classroom. But, the truth is that Wendy wasn't going to be in any music lesson today.

"Guys, believe me." Wendy hears a nearby group of boys. "When I was going home, I saw a naked girl on the street."

"No way, and how did she look like?" Another boy asks. Wendy pretends to see her bag to hear the answer.

"I didn't see her face, but it's true, she was totally bare."

"Good one, Ryan. Next time, you'll tell us that you saw a UFO." The girl smiled and kept walking.

Wendy Clarkson is one of the most popular girls in her middle school, a beautiful blonde girl with long hair and pretty blue eyes. She was considered to be well behaved, elegant and mysterious since nobody actually knew her outside of school. Though, today, there was someone looking at her back.

"Lenny, hey, Lenny." A hand passes in his face. "Lenny!" Someone shouts.

"Carl, I'm not deaf." Lenny cleans his ear. "What do you want?"

"Nothing, I wanted to talk." Carl notices the blonde girl at the distance. "Oh, I see what's going on here." He laughs. "You are still looking at the golden lady." He refers to Wendy's nickname.

Lenny blushes. "I don't know what are you talking about."

"Come on, don't act as if you don't know." He presses a finger on his friend's cheek. "Why don't you go and tell her how you feel?"

"No way, what if she rejects me?" Lenny replies.

"Then she will reject you, either you do that or I'll tell her about you being a stalker."

"Fine, fine." Lenny agrees since Carl has been insisting for a while about this confession.

After leaving the school, Lenny was having a hard time to get confidence to confess to Wendy, he was following her until there was a good moment to do it.

"Where should I start?" Wendy looks around. "Oh, I know." She targets a location.

Lenny then wondered if he should say it as he sees the blonde girl walking into.......

choices: A pair of panties, worn as a mask
1213.content:
The pool? Didn't she say she had to take a piano lesson? Confused, Lenny followed her in. Maybe there'd be a good time to confess while they were here. Or maybe seeing her in a swimsuit would make him lose his nerve entirely. Honestly, either was possible.

Wendy walked straight into the women's changing room. Lenny obviously couldn't follow her in there, and he hadn't brought his own swim trunks either, so he was reduced to awkwardly waiting by the side of the pool as he fought an urge to flee.

Meanwhile, Wendy was happily smirking to herself as she got changed. This was going to be one of her most daring stunts yet. She couldn't wait! She rummaged through her bag. Ah, there it was...

After what seemed like an eternity for both parties, Wendy finally emerged from the changing room, wearing nothing but...
1213.title: The public pool

12133.content:
"This is it." Lenny says to himself. "I'll tell her face to face that I have a crush on her." He walks around in circles. "But how am I going to explain that I followed her? I'll look like a total...." Lenny gets shocked. "Pervert?" He sees a naked girl leaving the changing room with a pair of stripped panties and sunglasses covering her face.

"Okay, let's do this quick." Wendy thinks, while she walks out of the changing room. "First, let's test the water." She gets close to the pool and puts her left foot inside. "Too cold. Maybe if I walk to the other side of the pool." She smirks.

While Wendy was trying her routine, a man leaves to alert the guards.

"What do we have here?" The blonde teen looks around and notices Lenny, staring open-mouthed at her. "It's that the uniform of my school? Wait, I know him, he is from my class."

She giggles and runs towards him. "I guess it can't be helped." She stands in front of him and poses. "This guy should feel honored, he has no idea that his classmate is doing this kind of stuff."

However, Lenny gulps and asks. "Wendy, is that you?"

Wendy stops. "What!?" She thought. "How does he know it is me?" While the two were worried about their next move.

"Hey, you. Stop right there." A guard points to the naked teen.

"Crap, I ran out of time." Wendy reacts. "I need to get out of here." She is about to escape when. "Hey, you." She talks to Lenny. "My bag with my clothes is in the changing room, take it and bring in it to the back of this place in 5 minutes, get it?"

Lenny was confused, but he instinctively nods. He only sees how the girl quickly runs in her birthday suit and the guards chase her. With all the commotion, he goes inside the changing room and grabs the bag.
12133.title: A pair of panties, worn as a mask

121331.content:
Lenny had no idea what to think as he left the pool with Wendy's bag in hand. The cool, collected, mysterious Wendy that he had developed a crush on was actually a pervert who ran around naked in public.

That was...

That was...

That was... hot?

As that thought crossed his mind, Lenny stopped in his tracks. Was that really how he felt? The knowledge that his crush was a pervert made her more attractive? Not just any pervert either, she had to be the biggest perv he'd ever met. That was so hot.

As he circled around to the back of the pool, he made up his mind. He was going to confess to her right here and now, before she even had a chance to get dressed. With that conviction, he approached the meeting point she had designated.
121331.title: An uncommon confession.

choices: "Take your clothes off and let's have a talk like this."
She dresses up. "You will be in charge of my clothes from now on."
1213311.content:
A determined Lenny waits behind the public pool, afraid of a possible escape from Wendy because it already passed 10 minutes since she asked him to bring her bag.

"Good, you are still here." He hears and sees the masked nude girl standing in front of him. "My bag, please." She extends her hand.

"Do you mind taking off your....panties?" Lenny notices she wasn't wearing a mask.

"Guess this is the end." Wendy thinks. "You knew this was going to happen at some point." She removes the glasses and the underwear from her face.

"There, you were right." Wendy crosses her arms, really not caring about her current state. "Now, what do you want? Are you going to blackmail me?"

"No, it's nothing like that." Lenny assures. "I wanted to ask you something." Lenny is nervous as he looks at her face.

"Then spit it out. Or what? Do I have monkeys on my face." She was getting tired of not going anywhere.

Lenny inhales and exclaims. "I think you are pretty hot and I want to date you." He realizes he added the word 'hot' and blushes.

Wendy is shocked. "Uhm, say that again?"

"I have a crush on you and I want to be your boyfriend." He corrects himself.

The blonde teen was confused. "Do you realize what I did back there, right?"

"Yeah, and I don't mind, you are beautiful and have a great body." He replies.

"I don't know what to say." She blushes. "Wait a second, how did you know it was me in the pool?"

"To be honest, I was going to confess to you before, but you went to the pool and the changing room." He responds.

"So you were following me." She says.

"No, no. It was only today. I only see you at the distance in the classroom." He regrets the sentence he just said.

"A stalker, huh?" She laughs. "Well, I have to admit, you are good looking, and it's the first time somebody confesses me. People don't say anything to me because they think I'm leagues above them or that I'm some sort of rich girl, who knows?" She laughs some more.

"So?" Lenny asks.

"First, my bag, please."

He gives it and the girl checks it. "Okay, it's a yes." She replies.

"Really?"

"But, with one condition." Wendy comments.

"Sure, anything."

She meditates. "Then."
1213311.title: The confession goes really well

choices: Lenny experiments with his new authority
12133112.content:
"In charge of your clothes?" Lenny asked as Wendy began to get dressed. "You mean, like, I take care of your clothes while you do... your thing?"

"No." Wendy replied, exasperated. "I mean, you're in charge of what I wear. At all times, I can only wear... or not wear... what you tell me to. I can't even touch an article of clothing without your permission."

"What? Wh-why would you give me that power? Why would you give anyone that power?"

"For the thrill, of course. The thrill of having no control over my own wardrobe! I'm getting excited just thinking about it!"

"Okay... you have a deal." Lenny conceded as Wendy finished getting dressed.
12133112.title: She dresses up. "You will be in charge of m...

choices: To the mall. (The towel she is wearing.)
121331122.content:
After talking to each other for a couple of days, Lenny and Wendy agreed to have their first date next Saturday. That day, the bell of Wendy's house rings. "I'm coming!" She walks downstairs, wearing only a towel as she just came out of the shower. "Who is it?"

"It's Lenny." He answers, holding a bag.

"Hey, you." She opens the door and kisses him on the cheek.

"Hi, are you ready?" He asks.

"No, I was waiting for you, remember our deal?" She smiles.

"Of course, but, I realized you still needed these." Lenny takes out the panties and sunglasses. "We can't risk somebody recognizing you."

"Oh, how nice of you." She giggles. "Do you have a place in mind? Wait, come on in and tell me while you choose my clothes." She comments.

"About that." He steps into the house. "Are your parents home?" Lenny closes the door.

"No, both are working, mom is busy in the beauty salon and dad is training soldiers in the military camp." She takes off the towel and dries herself. "Why?"

"Because I already decided the place for our date and what are you going to wear."

"Really? Then don't keep me waiting and say it." Wendy smirks.

Lenny, worried about she might respond, says. "We are going to....
121331122.title: Skip to their first date
